Defendant'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jacqueline Ravenscroft of the law offices of Tobener Ravenscroft (415-504-2165) appears as counsel for plaintiff/non-opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendant'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions pursuant to CCP 2033.290 (which authorizes such a motion when a party deems an answer "evasive or incomplete" or an objection "without merit or too general") is granted in part and denied in part as set forth in the written order signed and filed in open court this date. Sanctions denied. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
